title: Smoky Ethiopian Curry
description: A unique fusion of Ethiopian flavors with a smoky twist, served over a bed of fresh collard greens.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger, sauté for 1 minute.
Add sliced peppers, cook for 5 minutes.
Add stew mix, cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in coconut milk, bring to a simmer.
Add chopped collard greens, cook until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over a bed of additional greens, garnish with sliced peppers if desired.
Cooking time may vary depending on the type of peppers used.
Serve with naan or rice if desired.
